prestazioni: LS6 (6.0L V8, RPO LQ9) engine swap with forged internals: Mahle 2618 alloy pistons (9.5:1 compression), Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.000" stroke), and Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length) for 700+ HP reliability under forced induction.

Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285S turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4" V-band downpipe and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a Vibrant Performance 4" titanium exhaust system and Borla Pro XS mufflers (3.5" outlets).

Holley Dominator EFI ECU with a custom LS6-specific calibration by HP Tuners, featuring a 123Motorsport 8-layer flex-fuel sensor, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors (pre- and post-cat), and a Nitrous Express GenX Direct Port system (150hp shot, wet setup) with a 10lb bottle.
estetica: RideTech Air Ride Management System with 4-corner AccuAir E-Level sensors and Slam Specialties RE-7 rear bags, paired with a custom C6 Corvette spindle conversion for a 3" drop in front and 4" in rear (static).

Forgiato Trakan 22x12" (front) and 22x14" (rear) wheels with a +44mm offset, wrapped in Nitto NT555RII tires (305/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear) and Baer 6P Extreme Plus 6-piston calipers with 14.2" two-piece rotors (front) and 4-piston rear calipers with 13.0" rotors.

RK Sport SS-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with a custom PPG Hot Hues "Lime Squeeze" paint job, paired with Oracle Lighting IllumaMesh grille insert (RGB, 16.8M colors) and Anzo USA LED taillights (smoked, sequential turn signals).
